summary: Ran full backend regression plus focused frontend E2E for lineage/continuity and bubble controls. Backend lineage continuity behavior passed; frontend bubble/continuity interactions passed; Files & Artifacts open flow regressed from shell/menu path during this run.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking Files & Artifacts from header menu did not open artifacts drawer in 3 consecutive reproductions.
Files & Artifacts drawer could not be reliably opened after the menu-files failure path, blocking full regression of file/link UI in this run.

action_items: Fix Files & Artifacts open behavior from header dropdown ([data-testid='caos-header-menu-files']).
Verify and stabilize Files & Artifacts open behavior from right-side button ([data-testid='caos-open-artifacts-button']) after menu interactions.
Re-run frontend regression for menu/files/artifacts/voice/search/thread flows after this UI fix.
critical_code_review_comments: useCaosShell has unresolved React hook dependency warnings in frontend logs (stale-closure risk across session/profile/artifact callbacks).
Chat route still returns raw internal exception text via HTTP 500 detail; sanitize server errors before returning to clients.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md before auth tests; file currently has no credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_caos_lineage_<token>@example.com users and isolated sessions/chats via public APIs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend lineage continuity is covered by new pytest file and passes. Frontend: Reply/Useful/Receipt controls and continuity-card hydration passed. Stop-loop rule reached after 3 failed attempts on menu/files artifacts open selectors.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: open header menu -> click Files & Artifacts. Expected artifacts drawer, observed no drawer open across 3 attempts; subsequent files flow checks became unstable/blocked in that state. Likely UI state/event handling issue around menu-to-drawer transition (setMenuOpen(false) + onOpenArtifacts) or interaction interception around the right-side action region.
